personal.name: Muhammad Mujtahid
personal.title: Software Engineer Portfolio
personal.description: Software Engineer specializing in MERN stack delivering full-stack solutions with clean architecture.

about.intro: I'm a Software Engineer specializing in MERN stack development, currently pursuing a BSc in Computer Science at BRAC University while working as a Junior Software Engineer at Fatmonk Studio.
about.details: My journey in tech began with frontend development and has since evolved into full-stack engineering, where I craft scalable, high-performance applications from concept to deployment. I’ve built and contributed to SaaS platforms, POS systems, headless e-commerce solutions, analytics dashboards, workflow automation tools, and custom CRM systems, focusing on creating seamless, efficient, and maintainable digital experiences that drive business impact. I specialize in React, Next.js, Node.js, Nest.js, and modern web technologies, with a strong emphasis on clean architecture, scalability, and performance optimization. My development approach blends best practices in API design, modular architecture, and cloud-native deployment to ensure reliability and maintainability at scale.
about.philosophy: I believe in clean code, continuous learning, and delivering projects on time with uncompromising quality. Every project is an opportunity to solve real-world problems through technology, and I’m passionate about building products that make a meaningful impact.

projects.title: Fleeting Commerce — White Label E-commerce SaaS
projects.description: Designed and developed a multi-tenant white-label e-commerce SaaS platform enabling businesses to launch fully branded online stores. Implemented domain-based storefront rendering, theme customization, subscription management, and secure payment integration, ensuring scalability, tenant isolation, and production-grade performance.

projects.title: Simply Gaines
projects.description: Collaborated with a USA-based client to build a multi-role platform for Agencies, Organizations, and Contributors. Implemented role-based onboarding enabling agencies to manage clients, teams, employees, and contributors. Built workflows for projects, campaigns, brand management, and team collaboration. Integrated social media management (Facebook, X) and cloud storage services (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox), and contributed to dual marketplaces for tools/templates and contributor hiring.

projects.title: SparkleMusic
projects.description: Cross-platform React Native app for music streaming and downloads from YouTube. Mobile-first entertainment platform.

projects.title: Bangladesh Startup Connect 2025
projects.description: Dynamic event website with CMS functionality for BIDA's investment summit. Built with modern React architecture and state management.

projects.title: Task Master Pro
projects.description: Centralized project and team management platform with role-based permissions. Full-stack solution with modern MERN architecture.

projects.title: Fatmonk Studio Website
projects.description: Official website with custom CMS-like functionality and secure backend. Professional company website with modern design.

projects.title: Feerot
projects.description: E-commerce coupon and discount platform with real-time tracking. Modern shopping companion application.

achievements: Specialized in MERN stack delivering full-stack solutions with clean architecture

Built end-to-end SaaS applications, POS and inventory management systems, headless e-commerce platforms, and data analytics dashboards with a focus on performance, scalability, and clean architecture.
Collaborated with stakeholders for requirement gathering and ongoing support
Lead frontend developer on two major client projects
Handled frontend architecture, routing, state management, and API integration
Delivered projects on time with high quality and client satisfaction

features.title: Clean Code
features.description: Writing maintainable, scalable, and efficient code that stands the test of time.

features.title: Design-First
features.description: Bridging the gap between design and development with pixel-perfect implementations.

features.title: Performance
features.description: Optimizing applications for speed, accessibility, and exceptional user experience.

features.title: Collaboration
features.description: Working closely with teams to deliver projects that exceed expectations.

info.txt.content:
Name: Muhammad Mujtahid
Role: Software Engineer
Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh

About:
I'm a Software Engineer specializing in MERN stack development. Currently pursuing BSc in Computer Science at BRAC University while working as a Software Engineer at Fatmonk Studio. My journey in tech started with frontend development and has evolved into full-stack expertise.

I have hands-on experience building admin dashboards, analytics tools, e-commerce platforms, and CRM systems. I specialize in React, Next.js, Node JS, and modern web technologies with a focus on delivering high-quality solutions that meet client requirements.

Philosophy:
I believe in clean architecture, continuous learning, and delivering projects on time with high quality. Every project is an opportunity to solve real-world problems through technology.

Quick Facts:
- Experience: 3+ Years
- Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- Education: BRAC University
- Projects: 7+ Major
